---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or change for CragTrails
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Important:** CragTrails uses the Skeptical CEO Review Process for all work. We start by assuming most proposed features add bloat or attack the wrong priority. Strong evidence is required.

Please read `CONTRIBUTING.md` before filling this out.

---

## The Climber Problem

What real problem do climbers (especially new climbers, families, or people on the road) have that this feature would solve?

Include a specific quote or a precise analogy to how AllTrails solves a similar spatial discovery problem for hikers.

## Proposed Solution

High-level description of what you think should be built.

## Why This, Why Now?

What evidence (user research, your own climbing experience, behavioral data, competitive analysis) suggests this will meaningfully improve acquisition or retention?

## Simplicity Check

How will you ensure this does **not** make the app harder for a 10-year-old to use? Reference the current patterns (map + list hybrid, big tap targets, grade color language, preview → modal flow, etc.).

## Why Not a Much Simpler Alternative?

What is the absolute simplest possible version of this idea? Why won't that version solve the problem?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, links, competitor examples, or anything else.

---

**Next step:** If this idea survives initial skeptical discussion, the eventual PR will require a full formal Proof of Value section using the exact four questions.

We would rather say "no" to 10 good ideas than say "yes" to one that slowly damages the focused, trustworthy experience climbers love.
